summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tenant Data Migration feature. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all data migration panel elements working correctly including summary cards, collection breakdown table, and sub-tabs.
critical_code_review_comments: Migration analysis endpoint correctly returns all 18 CVE collections with total/legacy_docs/already_migrated counts
Migration endpoint properly validates tenant_id and returns 400 for invalid tenant
All 279 documents across 18 collections have been migrated to tenant_id='40e6f47e-b021-4605-9e1c-7a0992854f6c'
CVE dashboard correctly returns total_cves=23 after migration
Tickets endpoint works correctly with simplified _tenant_filter (strict equality)
Frontend Data Migration panel correctly shows migration complete status with 0 legacy documents
All 18 collection rows display 'Done' status badges
Sub-tabs (Users & Roles / Data Migration) work correctly under Users & RBAC tab
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tenant Data Migration feature fully functional. Migration has been completed - all 279 documents across 18 CVE collections now have tenant_id assigned. The _tenant_filter methods in cve_management_service.py and ticketing_service.py have been simplified to strict equality (no legacy fallback). Data Migration panel accessible via Users & RBAC > Data Migration sub-tab. Key tenant IDs: Default Organization=40e6f47e-b021-4605-9e1c-7a0992854f6c, Acme Corp=3aed1ef1-3780-4c75-9908-425f3921c88d.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/tenants/migration-analysis: PASS - Returns 18 collections with total_documents=279, total_legacy_documents=0, migration_needed=false
backend_api_tests.POST /api/tenants/migrate-data (invalid: PASS - Returns 400 with 'Target tenant not found'
backend_api_tests.POST /api/tenants/migrate-data (valid te: PASS - Returns success=true with collection breakdown
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cve/entries: PASS - Returns all 23 CVEs with tenant_id populated
backend_api_tests.GET /api/cve/ticketing/tickets: PASS - Returns 4 tickets with tenant_id after _tenant_filter simplification

frontend_ui.Users & RBAC tab sub-tabs: PASS - 'Users & Roles' and 'Data Migration' sub-tabs present with correct icons
frontend_ui.Data Migration panel header: PASS - Shows 'Tenant Data Migration' with description
frontend_ui.Legacy Docs card: PASS - Shows 0 with green color indicating complete
frontend_ui.Migration Status card: PASS - Shows 'Complete' with green checkmark icon
frontend_ui.Collection Breakdown table: PASS - All 18 collections displayed with Total/Legacy/Migrated/Status columns
frontend_ui.All collection rows: PASS - All 18 rows show 'Done' status badge
